svg.title: Skill usage map
svg.desc: Routing reference for all 21 skills grouped by intent: deciding, reviewing, creating, prompting, frontend, and workflow.
svg.text: Start at the question, follow your intent, tap any skill for its full description

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the dispatcher skill — when does it route automatically?')
sendPrompt('Explain the deciding branch: clarifying-questions, decision-toolkit, anti-sycophancy')
sendPrompt('Explain the reviewing branch: sparring-partner, audits, validator')
sendPrompt('Explain the creating branch: writing pipeline, prompting, frontend')

svg.text: Typical flow: clarifying-questions → decision-toolkit, with anti-sycophancy upstream on the question

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain sparring-partner skill and its stress-test mode')

svg.text: task-audit answers "did I finish"; blind-spot-audit answers "what was never in scope"
style-enforcer = humanizer + fact-checker chained. Run it before publishing anything written
